## MVP Scope Check

- [ ] This PR supports the MVP telemetry flow.
- [ ] This PR does not add command handling.
- [ ] This PR does not add MQTT auth/TLS/failover unless explicitly planned outside MVP.
- [ ] This PR does not mix persistence success with publish success.
- [ ] This PR keeps transport, persistence, and result handling responsibilities separated.
